name: Al Jabr Islamic School

campuses.name: Main Campus
campuses.address: Jl. Bango II No.34-38, Pondok Labu, Cilandak, South Jakarta 12450, Indonesia

intelligence.verdict: Islamic international school. Integrates Islamic values with international standards. Appeals to Muslim families wanting faith-based education.
paragraphs: Islamic international school. Integrates Islamic values with international standards. Appeals to Muslim families wanting faith-based education.

fees.note: Approximate annual fee range: US$4.9K – US$12K. Contact the school for the full fee schedule and payment options.

paragraphs: Diverse international and local student body. Contact the school for current enrolment details.
Facilities include: Science laboratories, Libraries, Mosque, Sports facilities, Swimming pool.
